text: I feel an air of curiosity and anticipation here, surrounded by the sharp angles and glass walls of this clean, modern space. Entering the exhibit labeled 'R+D,' I sense the spirit of innovation and inquiry. The vibrant colors and digital displays suggest that I am in a place celebrating discovery, collaboration, and the future. The thoughtful design invites me to ponder the ways in which humans and intelligent machines interact. I feel both small amidst the expanse of knowledge and hopeful about our capacity to explore and learn.
